summary: Comprehensive testing of CSV Import for Expenses feature - All features working. Backend 11/11 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional with all CSV import features tested.
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - CSV import creates expenses dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV Import for Expenses fully tested. Endpoints: POST /api/expenses/import-csv (preview with column mapping), POST /api/expenses/import-confirm (create expenses). Features verified: standard CSV (comma-separated), French bank CSV (semicolon-separated), column auto-detection (date, description, amount, category, notes), amount parsing ($, CAD, comma decimals), date parsing (YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY), editable preview table, row toggle on/off, confirm import creates expenses.

depenses_page.import_csv_button: PASS - 'Importer CSV' button visible and clickable

csv_import_modal.column_mapping_badges: PASS - Shows detected columns (Date ← Date, Montant ← Montant, etc.)
csv_import_modal.preview_table: PASS - Table with Incl., Description, Montant, Date, Catégorie, Notes columns

csv_formats_tested.french_bank_csv: PASS - Date de transaction;Libellé;Débit;Crédit;Type with semicolon separator

import_flow.preview_modal: PASS - Modal opens with mapping and preview
import_flow.edit_values: PASS - Can edit amount, description, etc. before import
import_flow.toggle_rows: PASS - Can exclude rows from import
import_flow.list_refresh: PASS - Expense list updates with imported expenses

csv_import: POST /api/expenses/import-csv - Upload CSV, get preview with column mapping
verified_behavior: Column auto-detection using regex patterns (date, montant, debit, libell, categ, note)
Amount parsing handles: comma decimals, $, CAD, €, parentheses for negative
Date parsing handles: YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, and more
Skips rows with zero amount AND empty description

mocked_apis: None - All APIs are real (MongoDB for storage)
